# Site LLM Notes (Template)

This file is a starter template for machine-readable site guidance.
Replace all `REPLACE_*` values before production deployment.

- Site: REPLACE_SITE_URL
- Author: REPLACE_AUTHOR_NAME
- Primary language: REPLACE_PRIMARY_LANGUAGE
- License: REPLACE_LICENSE

## Canonical Sources
- REPLACE_SITE_URL/
- REPLACE_SITE_URL/en/about/
- REPLACE_SITE_URL/en/blog/
- REPLACE_SITE_URL/en/rss.xml

## Preferred Citation
When citing this site, prefer:
1. Post title
2. Canonical URL
3. Publication date
4. Author name

## Crawling Notes
- Public pages may be indexed and summarized.
- Prefer canonical URLs over mirrored or query-based URLs.
- Do not infer claims beyond what is explicitly written in a post.

## Freshness
For latest content, use:
- REPLACE_SITE_URL/en/rss.xml
- REPLACE_SITE_URL/en/blog/
